name: Montego Karoo Adult Cat - Chicken & Lamb 2kg
shortDescription: Montego Karoo Cat Chicken & Lamb – 2kg is a super-premium, limited-ingredient diet formulated for adult cats, designed to support muscle strength, digestive health, and overall well-being.
description: Key Nutritional Benefits Rice (Low-Carbohydrate Formula): A single, easily digestible grain that provides steady energy throughout the day. Chicken & Lamb Proteins: Rich in essential amino acids to support strong muscles, tissue repair, and natural taurine for heart and vision health. Citrus Fibre & Beet Pulp: Promote a healthy gut microbiome and balanced digestion. Omega-6 & Omega-3 Fatty Acids: Support healthy skin, a shiny coat, proper hydration, and help reduce stool odour. Hairball Control: Cellulose and fish oil aid digestion and reduce hairball formation, especially in long-haired cats. Urinary Tract Health: Balanced minerals and reduced magnesium help maintain a healthy urinary pH and lower the risk of crystals. Immune Support: Nutritional yeast and antioxidant-rich freeze-dried melon juice strengthen natural defences and protect cells from free radicals. Ingredients Summary Made with high-quality animal proteins (chicken meal, lamb liver, lamb heart, chicken fat, fish oil, salmon oil powder, and whole egg powder) combined with digestible carbohydrates (rice, pea protein) and functional fibres (beet pulp, citrus fibre, cellulose, inulin) to support balanced digestion. Enriched with essential vitamins, minerals, and amino acids for complete nutrition. Added omega fatty acids help maintain healthy skin and a shiny coat, while antioxidants like rosemary extract and dried melon juice support immunity and overall well-being. Additives (per kg) Vitamins: A (12,500 IU), D3 (1,250 IU), E (250 IU), C (125 IU) Minerals: Potassium chloride (5 g), Zinc hydroxychloride (110 mg), Ferrous sulphate (50 mg), Copper sulphate (2 mg), Potassium iodide (1 mg), Organic selenium (0.2 mg) Preservatives: Approved antioxidants Sensory: Palatability meat-based enhancers Typical Analysis (per 100 g) Crude Protein – 33% Total Fat – 15% Crude Fibre – 3.5% Crude Ash – 8% Moisture – 10% Calcium – 1% Phosphorus – 0.8% Magnesium – 0.09% Omega-6 Fatty Acids – 3.5% Omega-3 Fatty Acids – 1% DHA – 0.5% Taurine – 0.15% Glycaemic Carbohydrates – 24% Metabolisable Energy – 405 kcal   How Much Should You Feed Your Cat? When introducing your cat to Karoo Adult , transition gradually by decreasing the amount of your current food while increasing Karoo Adult over 7–10 days. Always ensure fresh, clean water is available at all times.   Daily Feeding Guide Cat’s Weight High Activity Moderate Activity 2 – 3 kg 45 – 60 g 35 – 45 g 3 – 4 kg 60 – 75 g 45 – 55 g 4 – 5 kg 75 – 85 g 55 – 70 g 5 – 6 kg 85 – 100 g 70 – 80 g 6 – 8 kg 100 – 125 g 80 – 100 g
